summary: Completed testing of iteration 19 features: Settings single scrollable list, Event form dropdowns, Content page story creation and task date edit dialogs, and backend PDF endpoint. All 12 features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Settings page: single scrollable list with sections АВТОМАТИЗАЦІЯ, ЩОДЕННО, МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ, SMM, МАРКЕТИНГ, ЩОМІСЯЦЯ ✓
2. Settings: Google Calendar shows status (підключено/не підключено) ✓
4. Settings: task counts - management 15, smm 30, marketing 2, monthly 15, daily 2 ✓
5. Event form: type dropdown is narrower (~130px), positioned to the right of title input ✓
6. Event form: spots field is a dropdown button (not input), shows list of numbers 4-30 ✓
7. Event form: price field has inputMode='numeric' + dropdown with preset values (500-2000 ₴) ✓
8. Content page /content: ІСТОРІЇ column has + button for adding stories manually ✓
9. Content page: clicking an announcement card opens task date edit dialog (not redirect to event) ✓
10. Content page: new story dialog opens with title, date picker, notes fields ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Settings redesigned from 4-column grid to single scrollable list - working correctly
Event form type dropdown correctly narrowed to 130px and positioned right of title
Spots field correctly changed from input to dropdown button with 4-30 range
Price field correctly has numeric input mode with dropdown preset values
Content page story creation dialog working with + button in ІСТОРІЇ column
Task date edit dialog correctly opens for announcement/story/post cards instead of redirecting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 features verified: Settings is now a single scrollable list (not 4 columns) with sections АВТОМАТИЗАЦІЯ, ЩОДЕННО, МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ (15), SMM (30), МАРКЕТИНГ (2), ЩОМІСЯЦЯ (15). Event form has narrower type dropdown (130px), spots as dropdown button (4-30), price as numeric input with dropdown (500-2000). Content page at /content has + button for manual story creation in ІСТОРІЇ column, clicking any card opens task date edit dialog. Backend endpoints: GET /api/docs/app-logic.pdf returns PDF, GET /api/altegio/status returns {connected: true/false}. External URL: https://task-hub-890.preview.emergentagent.com
